snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters
snippet.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. You asked for it. The continuation of the series. This was absolutely insane.

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @dream
➽ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames 
George: @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap: @Sapnap 
Antfrost: @Antfrost 
awesamdude: @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

snippet.title: [CC SUB] Official Trailer - The Water นทีร้อยเล่ห์ | บ้านวาทินวณิช 4 Elements
snippet.description:
ท่ามกลางกระแสธารที่เชี่ยวกรากของโลกธุรกิจ "ความภักดี" ถูกใช้เป็นเครื่องมือชิ้นสุดท้ายในการทำลายคู่แข่ง เมื่อ 'ชลลดา' หญิงสาวผู้รับคำสั่งจากครอบครัว ต้องแทรกซึมเข้าไปในโรงแรมของ 'อาโป' ผู้บริหารสาวนิ่งลึกที่ขึ้นชื่อว่าเดาใจยากที่สุด เพื่อล้วงความลับ อำนาจและความโลภกำลังจะเปลี่ยนโชคชะตาของเธอทั้งคู่ไปตลอดกาล

⏳เมื่อความลับที่ต้องล้วง กลายเป็นเงื่อนไขบีบบังคับหัวใจ 💞 เมื่อความใกล้ชิดถูกใช้เป็นเครื่องมือเข้าหาเป้าหมายที่ดูอันตรายกว่าที่คิด และเมื่อ "แผนลวง" ที่ต้องทำให้แนบเนียน กลับกลายเป็นความรู้สึกที่เกิดขึ้นจริง

ภารกิจที่เริ่มจากผลประโยชน์ แต่ต้องเดิมพันด้วยหัวใจของคนสองคน
เล่ห์กลที่เดิมพันด้วยความแค้น กำลังจะกลายเป็นสายใยรักที่นิรันดร์ 

น้ำนิ่งไหลลึก ยิ่งถลำลึกลงไป ยิ่งอันตรายเกินกว่าจะถอนตัว 🌊

Amidst the raging currents of the corporate world, "loyalty" is used as the ultimate weapon to destroy rivals. When 'Chonlada', acting on strict orders from her family, must infiltrate the hotel of 'Apo' a deeply reserved female executive known for being impossibly hard to read to uncover her secrets, power and greed are about to change both of their destinies forever. 

⏳When the secrets she must steal become the very chains that bind her heart 💞 When intimacy is used as a tool to approach a target far more dangerous than expected And when a flawless "deception" turns into genuine feelings.

A mission born from self-interest must now be gambled with the hearts of two people. A vengeful scheme is about to blossom into an eternal bond of love.
Still waters run deep. 

The deeper she dives, the more impossible it becomes to escape. 🌊

เล่ห์กลที่เดิมพันด้วยความแค้น กำลังจะกลายเป็นสายใยรักที่นิรันดร์ 

น้ำนิ่งไหลลึก ยิ่งถลำลึกลงไป ยิ่งอันตรายเกินกว่าจะถอนตัว 🌊

Amidst the raging currents of the corporate world, "loyalty" is used as the ultimate weapon to destroy rivals. When 'Chonlada', acting on strict orders from her family, must infiltrate the hotel of 'Apo' a deeply reserved female executive known for being impossibly hard to read to uncover her secrets, power and greed are about to change both of their destinies forever. 

⏳When the secrets she must steal become the very chains that bind her heart 💞 When intimacy is used as a tool to approach a target far more dangerous than expected And when a flawless "deception" turns into genuine feelings.

A mission born from self-interest must now be gambled with the hearts of two people. A vengeful scheme is about to blossom into an eternal bond of love.
Still waters run deep. 

The deeper she dives, the more impossible it becomes to escape. 🌊

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.description:

Lyrics: 
For just a chance to win your heart

I’m trynna be your man
til the end of time
oh i’ll do anything, anything you ask me to

I would run through the fire just to be by your side
if your heart’s on the line you could take mine
It's crazy but it’s true. There's nothing I won’t do. 
I'd risk it all for you

I would swim across the sea just to show you
sacrifice my life just to hold you
I could go on and on to prove that you belong
here in my arms

Say you want the moon watch me, learn to fly
ain’t a mountain you could point to I wouldn’t climb

It's crazy but it’s true. There's nothing I won’t do

Bruno Mars is a 16x GRAMMY®-winning global superstar, singer, songwriter, multi-instrumentalist, producer, and one of the most-streamed artists in the world. Known for his showmanship and chart-toppers, Bruno has set a number of records throughout his career, including becoming the first artist ever to hit 150 million monthly listeners on Spotify, appearing on two of the fastest songs to reach one billion streams (for “Die with a Smile” with Lady Gaga and “APT.” with ROSÉ, and achieving the highest-certified song in RIAA history with 2010’s “Just the Way You Are”). Since launching a string of hits beginning in 2009, Bruno has sold over 150 million records worldwide, making him one of the best-selling artists of all time. Beyond his work as a soloist, Bruno is a member of the duo Silk Sonic with Anderson .Paak. In addition to his 35 Billboard Hot 100 hits, including nine number one singles, Bruno is the recipient of 16 GRAMMY® Awards (including “Album of the Year” for 24K Magic), 14 American Music Awards, and seven MTV Video Music Awards. His 24K Magic World Tour was among the highest-grossing tours in history, and within the top ten highest-grossing of the 2010s.

Since launching a string of hits beginning in 2009, Bruno has sold over 150 million records worldwide, making him one of the best-selling artists of all time. Beyond his work as a soloist, Bruno is a member of the duo Silk Sonic with Anderson .Paak. In addition to his 35 Billboard Hot 100 hits, including nine number one singles, Bruno is the recipient of 16 GRAMMY® Awards (including “Album of the Year” for 24K Magic), 14 American Music Awards, and seven MTV Video Music Awards. His 24K Magic World Tour was among the highest-grossing tours in history, and within the top ten highest-grossing of the 2010s.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: Siakol vs Eraserheads vs Rivermaya Nonstop💥Mga Kantang Masarap Balikan - Batang 90s Collection
snippet.description:
Relive the golden era of 90s Pinoy Rock with the timeless hits of Siakol, Eraserheads, and Rivermaya! 🎸
This nonstop playlist brings back the classic OPM songs that defined the Batang 90s generation. From heartfelt lyrics to unforgettable melodies, these legendary bands shaped the sound of Filipino rock music.
Whether you grew up listening to these songs on the radio or you're discovering them for the first time, this collection will take you on a nostalgic journey through the best of Tunog Kalye and Pinoy Rock classics.
🎧 Perfect for:
OPM lovers
Batang 90s nostalgia
Long drives and chill listening
Classic Filipino rock fans
🔥 Sit back, relax, and enjoy these Mga Kantang Masarap Balikan from three of the most iconic OPM bands.
💬 Comment below: Which band is your favorite — Siakol, Eraserheads, or Rivermaya?
👍 Don’t forget to Like, Share, and Subscribe for more OPM nonstop playlists!
#Siakol #Eraserheads #Rivermaya #OPM #PinoyRock #Batang90s
